title: Budget & Token Capping
concept: Setting strict per-run token limits and cost ceilings to block runaway loop billing.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of output filtering in AI agents?

options.text: To limit the number of tokens used in a run
To scan outputs for sensitive information
To increase the speed of AI responses

exercises.explain: Output filtering ensures that AI outputs do not reveal sensitive information like API keys or inappropriate language.

cards.title: Understanding Budgets
cards.body: Just like a budget helps people manage money, token limits help control how much an AI can use at once.

cards.title: Token Capping
cards.body: Token capping refers to setting a maximum limit on the number of tokens that can be used in a single run of the AI.

cards.title: A Spending Cap
cards.body: Think of token capping like a spending cap on your credit card—if you reach the limit, you can't spend more. This keeps you from overspending.

cards.title: Practical Application
cards.body: If you set a budget of 100 tokens for each AI run, the AI will stop using tokens once it reaches that limit, preventing unexpected costs.

cards.title: Myth: Token Limits Slow Down AI
cards.body: Some people think that capping tokens makes the AI less effective, but it actually helps manage costs without sacrificing quality.

cards.title: Token Usage Comparison
cards.body: Here’s how token capping compares to unlimited usage:

exercises.prompt: What does setting a token cap help prevent?
exercises.explain: Setting a token cap helps prevent unexpected billing by limiting how many tokens can be used in a run.

exercises.prompt: Token capping is unnecessary for controlling costs.
exercises.explain: False! Token capping is crucial for controlling costs and avoiding runaway expenses.

exercises.prompt: Setting a budget prevents runaway __________ costs.
exercises.sentence: Setting a budget prevents runaway billing costs.
exercises.explain: The correct word is "billing" because setting a budget specifically helps manage billing costs.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following helps manage AI costs effectively?
exercises.explain: Setting a token cap is the best way to manage costs effectively, as it prevents overspending.

exercises.prompt: What is a key benefit of implementing both output filtering and token capping in AI systems?

options.text: They help prevent cost overruns and protect sensitive data
They eliminate the need for AI monitoring

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that both measures help prevent cost overruns and protect sensitive data, ensuring the safe and economical use of AI.
